title: fimbristylis subdura
intro: Fimbristylis subdura, also known as the bush lily or slender fimbristylis, is a type of tropical grass that belongs to the sedge family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Fimbristylis subdura include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a wound healer. In herbal preparations, Fimbristylis subdura can be found in the form of decoctions, infusions, and topical applications, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
